notes: Removed 6 broken vehicles: McLaren 720S, Ford Mustang S550, Nissan Silvia S15, Nissan GT-R R35, Lamborghini Revuelto, Chevrolet Camaro ZL1+RS
Fixed missing tires on Chevrolet Corvette C7 Z06
Fixed outdated mod warning on Bugatti Chiron
Introduced free Lite version with 27 cars
Custom thumbnails for all 25 car brands
Small bugfix on two of the cars
Unified naming scheme across all vehicle files

description:
Mini's Mega Car Pack is the biggest curated vehicle pack for BeamNG.drive, featuring 106 individually tested cars from over 25 brands — including Toyota, Mazda, Nissan, Mitsubishi, Ford, Chevrolet, Audi, Bugatti, and Pagani. Every vehicle ships with a custom configuration built from scratch and a unique custom thumbnail, so the spawn menu stays clean and every car loads correctly, drives right, and sits at the right height.

There are no broken mods, no placeholder configs, and no filler. The pack is actively maintained and updated for every major BeamNG.drive release — currently up to date with BeamNG 0.38 and available on Modland. It has grown steadily from its first release to 106 vehicles, making it one of the most complete and consistently updated car packs in the BeamNG modding community.
name: Mini's Mega Car Pack
tagline: The largest curated BeamNG.drive car pack — 106 individually tested vehicles, updated for 0.38.
